title: Rainbow Shenanigans
description: Color-related changes like sorting colored blocks in the creative inventory.
body:
A client-side [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) mod that makes a couple color-related changes:
- Sorts colored blocks and items (like wool and dyes) by color in the creative inventory.
- Makes jeb_ sheep cycle through colors in a more rainbowy fashion.
- Changes the colors of the vanilla "Colormatic" splash.

The color order for each of these can be changed individually in the config screen accessible through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). Note that some settings use [dye colors](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Dye#Color_values) (with underscores instead of spaces) while others use [formatting code names](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Formatting_codes#Color_codes).

Before/after comaprison:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/q6PqLGjT/images/81c9ee9d4a9961791f713332299eb505b014efaa.png "Wool in the creative inventory, before and after")

Requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) version 4.9 or later.

Links: [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rainbow-shenanigans) · [GitHub](https://github.com/A5b84/rainbow-shenanigans) · [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/rainbow-shenanigans)
